Enabled.Name: Enable Crafting System
Enabled.Hint: Enable or disable the Fabricate crafting system globally.

SimpleOnly.Name: Show Simple Recipes Only
SimpleOnly.Hint: Hide advanced recipe features and show only simple ingredient-to-result recipes.

AutoCraft.Name: Auto-Craft
AutoCraft.Hint: Automatically craft items without showing a confirmation dialog when you have all required materials.

ActorSelector.ResultHint: Results will be added to this actor's inventory

CraftingHeader.RequiredSource: The selected crafting actor is always a component source.

SourceActorPicker.Label: Using components from:
SourceActorPicker.NoActors: No owned actors available for component sources.

RecipeList.AdjustFilters: Try adjusting your search or filters.
RecipeList.GMNeeded: The GM needs to create some recipes first.

RunSummary.NoActiveRuns: No active crafting runs for this actor.

Knowledge.LearningDisabled: Learning is not enabled for this crafting system
Knowledge.LinkedItemRequired: Recipe item link is required to learn this recipe
Knowledge.NoMatchingItem: No matching recipe item available to learn
Knowledge.NoNewRecipesLearned: {actor} already knows the matched recipe item recipes.

ManagerV2.GMOnly: Only GMs can manage crafting systems.
ManagerV2.Title: Crafting systems
ManagerV2.Subtitle: Manage the system definitions that organize Fabricate components, recipes, gathering, and feature rules.
ManagerV2.SelectSystemHint: Select a system to inspect its configuration.
ManagerV2.SystemLibraryHint: Select a row to view counts and enabled features.
ManagerV2.EmptyHint: Create a system to start organizing components and recipes.
ManagerV2.EmptySearchHint: Clear the search to show all configured systems.
ManagerV2.InspectorHint: The inspector shows counts, resolution mode, and enabled features for the selected system.

SystemEdit.Title: System settings
SystemEdit.Subtitle: Edit base settings for the selected crafting system without leaving manager v2.
SystemEdit.EditBaseSettingsHint: Changes use the existing admin store persistence and confirmation flows.
SystemEdit.ResolutionModeHint: Changing resolution mode uses the current destructive confirmation and cleanup behavior.
SystemEdit.NoFeatureToggles: No optional feature toggles are present on this system.
SystemEdit.DeepConfigHint: Categories, tags, essences, checks, requirements, visibility, alchemy, and gathering configuration stay in later manager-v2 views or the current admin for this slice.
SystemEdit.LegacyFallbackHint: Open the current admin when you need deeper configuration that is not part of this v2 edit slice.

FeatureHint.Gathering: Shows gathering environments and player gathering flows for this system.
FeatureHint.RecipeCategories: Adds category organization to recipe browsing and authoring.
FeatureHint.ItemTags: Enables managed component tags and tag-based ingredient options.
FeatureHint.Essences: Enables essence definitions and essence requirements.
FeatureHint.ComplexRecipes: Keeps legacy complex recipe controls available where this system uses them.
FeatureHint.MultiStepRecipes: Enables explicit recipe steps and step-level requirements.
FeatureHint.CraftingChecks: Enables system-level crafting check configuration in the current admin.
FeatureHint.OutcomeRouting: Enables routed outcome configuration where supported.
FeatureHint.EffectTransfer: Allows crafted results to inherit effects from source components.

Recipe.Title: Recipes
Recipe.Subtitle: Manage recipes for the selected crafting system.
Recipe.LibraryHint: Browse recipes for the selected system and open the existing editor for changes.
Recipe.EmptyHint: Create recipes for the selected crafting system.
Recipe.EmptySearchHint: Clear search and filters to show all recipes in this system.
Recipe.InspectorHint: The inspector shows recipe status, structure, and requirements for the selected row.

Component.Title: Components
Component.Subtitle: Manage item-backed components for the selected crafting system.
Component.LibraryHint: Browse item-backed components and open the existing component editor for changes.
Component.DropZoneLabel: Drop Foundry items to add components
Component.DropZoneHint: World, compendium, pack, or folder drops use the existing component import flow for the selected system.
Component.EmptyHint: Drop Foundry items into this page to add components to the selected system.
Component.EmptySearchHint: Clear search and filters to show all components in this system.
Component.NoSourceHint: This component does not expose a stored source UUID in the current item-card data.
Component.InspectorHint: The inspector shows component identity, source evidence, tags, essences, and existing actions for the selected row.

TagsCategories.Title: Tags & Categories
TagsCategories.Subtitle: Manage recipe category and item tag vocabulary for the selected crafting system.
TagsCategories.LibraryHint: Define recipe categories and item tags before assigning them elsewhere.
TagsCategories.CategoriesHint: General is always available. Add custom categories for recipes that need clearer grouping.
TagsCategories.ItemTagsHint: Use item tags for component organization and tag-based ingredient options.
TagsCategories.GeneralHint: Base category, not stored as a custom category.
TagsCategories.GeneralInspectorHint: General is the built-in category for recipes without a custom category and cannot be removed.
TagsCategories.OnlyGeneralHint: Add a custom category when recipes need more specific grouping.
TagsCategories.NoCategoryMatches: No custom categories match this search.
TagsCategories.NoTagsHint: Add tags before using tag-based ingredient options.
TagsCategories.NoTagMatches: No item tags match this search.
TagsCategories.RemoveCategoryConfirm: Remove {name}? {count} references may keep this category value until you update them.
TagsCategories.RemoveTagConfirm: Remove {name}? {count} references may keep this tag value until you update them.
TagsCategories.BlankCategoryFeedback: Enter a category name before adding it.
TagsCategories.GeneralReservedFeedback: General is already available as the base category.
TagsCategories.BlankTagFeedback: Enter a tag name before adding it.
TagsCategories.TagNormalizedFeedback: Tag added with cleaned-up lowercase text.
TagsCategories.InspectorHint: Define the vocabulary GMs use when assigning recipe categories and component tags.

Essence.Title: Essences
Essence.Subtitle: Manage essence definitions for the selected crafting system.
Essence.LibraryHint: Browse, create, and maintain essence definitions for the selected crafting system.
Essence.CreateSubtitle: Define identity, icon, and source linkage for a new essence.
Essence.CreateNoSourceSubtitle: Define identity and icon for a new essence.
Essence.CreateBandHint: Create and edit essences in the dedicated editor so browse rows stay selection-only.
Essence.EditSubtitle: Update identity, icon, and source linkage for this essence.
Essence.EditNoSourceSubtitle: Update identity and icon for this essence.
Essence.EditHint: Edit identity, icon, and source linkage for the selected essence definition.
Essence.Name: Name
Essence.SourceNoUuid: This component has no source item UUID.
Essence.SourceEvidenceHint: Stored source evidence remains readable until you clear or repair it.
Essence.SourceEditHint: Pick or drop a managed component to provide the effect-transfer source.
Essence.EmptyHint: Create an essence definition to start assigning essence quantities to components.
Essence.EmptySearchHint: Clear search and filters to show all essences in this system.
Essence.SaveFailed: Save failed. Check for duplicate or blank names and try again.
Essence.DiscardDirtyContent: The current essence has unsaved changes. Discard them and continue?
Essence.DeleteBlocked: Remove component usage before deleting this essence.
Essence.UsageBlockedHint: Remove this essence from components before deleting the definition.
Essence.InspectorHint: The inspector shows source linkage and component usage for the selected essence.
Essence.InspectorNoSourceHint: The inspector shows identity and component usage for the selected essence.
Essence.CreateInspectorHint: The inspector will show the essence ID after the draft is saved.

Environment.Title: Environments
Environment.Subtitle: Manage gathering environments for the selected crafting system.
Environment.EditSubtitle: Edit scene linkage, environment details, tasks, results, catalysts, visibility, timing, and validation in the v2 workspace.
Environment.LibraryHint: Browse scene-linked gathering environments and open the existing editor for task authoring.
Environment.EmptySearchHint: Clear search and filters to show all environments in this system.
Environment.InspectorHint: The inspector shows scene imagery, task evidence, draft state, and existing actions for the selected row.
Environment.EditHint: Edit scene linkage, environment details, tasks, results, catalysts, visibility, timing, and validation through the existing draft callbacks.
Environment.NoValidationIssues: No validation issues are currently reported.
Environment.NoAdvancedTaskFieldsHint: Progressive check controls appear here for progressive tasks.

SystemSettings.Title: Crafting System
SystemSettings.NoSystemSelectedHint: Create a new system to configure categories, tags, essences, and rules.
SystemSettings.Name: Name
SystemSettings.ResolutionModeHint: Controls how recipes in this system choose results and which advanced editor controls are available.
SystemSettings.ResolutionModeChangeContent: Changing resolution mode to {mode} will delete {count} recipe(s) in this crafting system and clean up related runs and learned recipes.
SystemSettings.AdvancedOptionsHint: Advanced options let you configure categories, item tags, essence definitions, resolution-driven recipe behaviour, and macro-driven crafting logic.
SystemSettings.AdvancedDisabled: Advanced options are disabled for this system.

Categories.Title: Recipe Categories
Categories.Hint: Organize and filter recipes by category in admin and crafting views.

ItemTags.Title: Item Tags
ItemTags.Hint: Use tags for categorization, sorting, and search in components.

Essences.Title: Essences
Essences.Hint: Define essence types with descriptions and optional source items.
Essences.NoComponentsAvailable: No components have been added to this system yet.

ComplexRecipes.Title: Complex Recipes
ComplexRecipes.Hint: Allow multiple ingredient sets, multiple result groups, and advanced routing controls.

MultiStepRecipes.Title: Multi-Step Recipes
MultiStepRecipes.Hint: Allow recipes to define explicit ordered steps with per-step ingredient/result and time requirements.

Gathering.Title: Gathering
Gathering.Hint: Enable gathering environments and task configuration for this crafting system.

TimeRequirements.Title: Time Requirements
TimeRequirements.Hint: Allow step-level crafting durations using minutes, hours, days, months, and years.

CurrencyRequirements.Title: Currency Requirements
CurrencyRequirements.Hint: Allow steps to require currency, resolved via system adapter or macros.

PropertyMacros.Title: Property Calculation Macros
PropertyMacros.Hint: Use macros to compute result property updates from crafting context.

CraftingChecks.Title: Crafting Checks
CraftingChecks.Hint: Choose a system-level check macro that returns pass/fail or named outcomes. Leave the macro blank to disable crafting checks.

Alchemy.Title: Alchemy
Alchemy.Hint: Configure the learning and failure behavior used by alchemy attempts in this crafting system.
Alchemy.LearnOnCraft: Learn recipes after a successful attempt
Alchemy.ConsumeOnFail: Consume submitted ingredients on failed attempts

OutcomeRouting.Title: Outcome Routing
OutcomeRouting.Hint: Map crafting-check outcomes to specific result groups when complex recipes are enabled.

EffectTransfer.Title: Effect Transfer
EffectTransfer.Hint: Transfer active effects from consumed ingredients to crafted result items.

RecipeVisibility.Title: Recipe Visibility
RecipeVisibility.Hint: Control which players can see recipes.
RecipeVisibility.PlayerNote: Per-recipe visibility restrictions can be configured in each recipe's editor. Restricted recipes are hidden from all players by default unless specific users are allowed.
RecipeVisibility.ItemLimitUses: Track limited uses on recipe items
RecipeVisibility.DragDropEnabled: Learn recipes from actor item drops

Items.DropZoneLabel: Drag items from sidebar/compendiums here to add them to this crafting system.
Items.SourceUuidCopyFailed: Could not copy source item UUID.
Items.NoManagedItemsHint: Drag in world or compendium items to build this system's item library.
Items.NoSystemHint: Create or select a crafting system to manage components.
Items.DropInvalidItem: Drop an Item document from sidebar or compendium.
Items.BulkImportUpdated: Imported {added} new, updated {updated}, skipped {skipped} of {total} items.
Items.DropNotAnItem: Only Item documents can be added as crafting components. Dropped: {type}.
Items.DropNoSystemSelected: Select a crafting system first before dropping items.

Editor.HintTagsAndEssences: Edit this component's tags and essences.
Editor.NoEditableFields: No editable component fields are enabled for this system.
Editor.NoTagsDefined: No tags defined in this system.
Editor.NoEssencesDefined: No essences defined in this system.

Recipes.NoRecipesHint: Create recipes for the selected crafting system.

Environments.Title: Gathering Environments
Environments.EmptyHint: Create a gathering environment to start configuring where players can gather.
Environments.EmptyActionHint: Create the first environment and configure its gathering tasks.
Environments.StoreUnavailable: Gathering environment data is not available.
Environments.Name: Name
Environments.LinkedSceneReferenceWarning: This linked scene UUID is preserved. If the scene no longer resolves, players are blocked until the reference is repaired.
Environments.NoTasksHint: Add a task so this environment has an activity players can attempt.
Environments.ImmediateTaskHint: Immediate task: resolves as soon as the player starts it.
Environments.TimeRequirementHint: A timed task creates an active gathering run and completes after this duration.
Environments.DefaultFailureOutcomeHint: Default failure feedback is used when no custom outcome is configured.
Environments.FailureOutcomeHint: Used when routed or progressive resolution fails. Use result group name "fail" for the canonical failure keyword.
Environments.NoVisibilityHint: Enable a gate when only some actors should see this task.
Environments.MissingMacroReferenceWarning: This saved macro UUID is not in the current macro list, but the reference is preserved until you change it.
Environments.MissingRollTableReferenceWarning: This saved roll table UUID is not in the current roll table list, but the reference is preserved until you change it.
Environments.RollTableHint: The drawn result name routes by normalized match to a result group name.
Environments.NoCatalystsHint: Add a catalyst when this task should require or consume a component.
Environments.NoResultGroupsHint: Add a group to define what this task can award.
Environments.NoResultsHint: Add a result item to this group so successful gathering awards something.
Environments.DeleteContent: Delete gathering environment {name}? This also cleans active and historical gathering runs that reference it.
Environments.DiscardDirtyContent: The current gathering environment has unsaved changes. Discard them and continue?

BasicInfo.CategoryHint: Define categories in Crafting Admin > Systems.

Visibility.GlobalHint: This system uses global visibility — all recipes are visible to all players. To control visibility per recipe, change the system's recipe visibility mode to Player-specific in the crafting admin.
Visibility.RestrictLabel: Restrict recipe visibility to specific users

LinkedItem.KnowledgeHint: Select or drop a system recipe item here. Players who own a matching copy of that item will gain access to this recipe under knowledge-mode visibility.
LinkedItem.MissingWarning: A recipe item is required for this crafting system's visibility mode.
LinkedItem.MissingSource: The source item for this recipe item no longer resolves.
LinkedItem.DropHint: Drop a recipe item or a world/compendium item here.
LinkedItem.DropInvalid: Drop a world item, compendium item, or system recipe item here.
LinkedItem.EmptyLibrary: No recipe items in this system yet. Drop one onto the target above to create it.
LinkedItem.NoSearchResults: No recipe items match the current search.
LinkedItem.RefreshButton: Sync recipe image from recipe item
LinkedItem.RefreshHint: Click to sync the recipe image.
LinkedItem.ImageLockedHint: Recipe image is locked to {name} while this recipe item is associated.
LinkedItem.DeleteConfirmNoRecipes: Delete recipe item "{name}" from this crafting system?
LinkedItem.DeleteConfirmWithRecipes: Delete recipe item "{name}"? {count} recipe(s) will lose this association:

IngredientSets.DropNewIngredient: Drop a component here to add a new ingredient group.
IngredientSets.NoEssencesDefined: No essences defined yet. Add essences in Crafting Admin > Systems.
IngredientSets.TagPlaceholdersEnabled: Tag placeholders are enabled for this crafting system.

Catalysts.EmptyState: Drop components here to add catalysts.

ResultGroups.EmptyState: Drop components here to add results.

ResultSelection.ResultGroupForSet: Result group for this ingredient set

ResultSelection.VariableMappingTitle: Result Group Mapping (for this ingredient set)
ResultSelection.AddGroupsFirstVariable: Add result groups first, then map them to ingredient sets.
ResultSelection.RollTableHint: Drawn result names are matched to Result Group names (case-insensitive). Use reserved fail/miss keywords in the roll table for failure outcomes.
ResultSelection.RollTableMissing: Roll table UUID is required for this provider.

OutcomeRouting.Hint: Route check outcomes to a specific result group. Leave blank to use default recipe output.

ItemPicker.EmptyHint: Add items in the Crafting Admin Components tab.

Gathering.Title: Gathering
Gathering.Subtitle: Choose an actor and gather from available environments.
Gathering.InventoryTarget: Gathered results go to this actor.

Empty.NoSelectableActorsHint: Ask the GM to grant ownership of an actor before gathering.

Blocked.NoSelectableActors: You do not have an actor available for gathering.

Blocked.ActorNotSelectable: The selected actor is not available for gathering.
Blocked.NoVisibleTargetedTasks: No visible gathering tasks are available.
Blocked.BlindSoleTaskHidden: No gathering action is available here.
